title: homalanthus longipes
intro: Homalanthus longipes, also known as the "sensitive plant" or "touch-me-not," is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Homalanthus longipes include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its use in traditional remedies for skin conditions and wounds. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
